title: Formal follow-up with 3 facts — all included

scenario.intent: Follow up after client review meeting
key_facts: Pilot rollout starts the week of May 12
Revised pricing sheet will be sent by Friday
Case studies will be shared on Thursday

email.subject: Follow-up and next steps from today's review
email.body:
Dear Priya,

Thank you for your time in today's review. To recap and confirm next steps:

Pilot rollout remains on track for the week of May 12. I will share a revised pricing sheet by end of day Friday, and on Thursday I will send across the case studies we discussed.

Please let me know if anything above needs adjustment.

Best regards,
Alex
